note: NIST ACVP-Server FIPS-203 known-answer vectors for ML-KEM-768 (usnistgov/ACVP-Server: ML-KEM-keyGen-FIPS203 + ML-KEM-encapDecap-FIPS203). Only the parameterSet=ML-KEM-768 test groups are included. Oracle 2 (intermediate-byte KAT) per ADR 0003 — independent of the stdlib oracle and of this implementation. Counts: 25 keyGen, 25 encaps, 10 decaps.
